pagetext.p: After you cloned Rivetweb repository you can start a new website configuring Apache to let it know where Rivetweb and your website are.
Open Apache's configuration file and create this stanza of Rivet directives
pagetext.programlisting: <IfModule rivet_module> RivetServerConf ChildInitScript \ "namespace eval ::rivetweb { set rivetweb_root <rivetweb_root> }" RivetServerConf ChildInitScript "cd <website_root>" RivetServerConf ChildInitScript "source init.tcl" RivetServerConf BeforeScript "source before.tcl" </IfModule>
pagetext.p: Depending on your goal you may put these lines within a <VirtualHost>...</VirtualHost> definition and consider to add
To improve application safety if you have others Rivet based applications running on the same Apache server.
